name: Velvet Hammer
notes: Velvet Hammer Music and Management Group, 9014 Melrose Ave, West Hollywood, CA 90069. Music management firm representing System of a Down, Korn, Deftones, etc.

name: Anew Material
notes: Founded by Jiye Son (PhD CUNY). Makes PFAS-free, plant-based waterproof coatings. Backed by Harlem Biospace and Activate Global.

name: Agemica
notes: AGEMICA LTD registered in UK at 71-75 Shelton Street, Covent Garden, London. Appears to be a longevity/aging health company.

name: Superbio
notes: Multiple companies use 'Superbio' name. Best startup match is Superbio.ai in Palo Alto, CA — AI/ML platform for biological research, founded 2021, ~12 employees, raised $850K. Other Superbio entities exist (nutraceuticals in Iowa, manufacturer in NJ).

name: Adley Health
notes: Adley Health Inc registered in Colorado. Personal healthcare assistant app. Specific city within CO not confirmed in search results.

name: Hexagon
notes: Most prominent company named 'Hexagon' is Hexagon AB, a multinational industrial technology group headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden. No CRM-context startup named exactly 'Hexagon' clearly identified — defaulting to Hexagon AB.

name: Spangle
notes: Spangle AI founded 2024 by Maju Kuruvilla (ex-Bolt CEO, ex-Amazon VP). Agentic AI platform for e-commerce revenue optimization. Raised $6M seed from Madrona. Headquartered in Bellevue, WA.

name: Field Good
notes: Multiple unrelated companies with similar names found (Fields Good Chicken in NYC, Field Goods produce delivery in Athens NY, FieldGoods UK, Fieldgood Italian research firm, field-good.org NGO). Cannot confidently identify which 'Field Good' this record refers to without more context.

name: LiamCo
notes: Could not identify a company called 'LiamCo' with sufficient confidence. Results returned Liam & Co. (women's fashion boutique, Ogden UT / Newark NJ), LIAMCO (Libyan American Oil Company), and Liam Corporation (Canada). No obvious startup match.

name: Kabuk
notes: KabuK Style Inc. headquartered in Nagasaki, Japan. Founded 2018. Subscription-based travel/hospitality startup (HafH platform). J-Startup program member.

name: Kapsule
notes: KAPSULE LIMITED registered in UK (company no. 11448952) at 124 City Road, London, EC1V 2NX. Africa's health-data infrastructure company operating across nine African markets. Founded 2020.

name: Freedom
notes: Freedom is a productivity/anti-distraction app (freedom.to) founded 2009, headquartered in Durham, NC. Helps over 1M users block distracting websites/apps across devices. Private company.
